build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(50, 50, 2)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(12.5).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=2).rect(40, 40).extrude(1)

STEP 4: Create bolt holes — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-18, -18).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(18, -18).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-18, 18).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(18, 18).circle(1.5).cutThruAll()

STEP 5: Add M3 bolt heads — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, -20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(20, -20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, 20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(20, 20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)

STEP 6: Add M3 bolt threads — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-18, -18).circle(1.5).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(18, -18).circle(1.5).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-18, 18).circle(1.5).extrude(1)
     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(18, 18).circle(1.5).extrude(1)

STEP 7: Add M3 bolt nuts — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, -20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)

     .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(-20, 20).rect(4, 4).extrude(1)
